---
title: "VIP: Verified Installation of Posit"
subtitle: "Automated validation for Posit Team deployments"
author: "Ian Flores Siaca"
date: "2026-04-07"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: default
    slide-number: true
    hash: true
    center: true
    transition: fade
    code-line-numbers: false
    mermaid:
      theme: neutral
---

## The Problem

- Customer installs Posit Team — "is it actually working?"
- Manual spot-checks are slow, inconsistent, and miss things
- Upgrades and config changes break things silently

::: {.notes}
Every SE knows the feeling — you finish an install, click around for a few minutes, and hope for the best. VIP replaces that with structured, repeatable validation.
:::

## What is VIP?

An automated test suite that validates Posit Team deployments — Connect, Workbench, and Package Manager.

- Runs tests against a live deployment (not mocks)
- Generates an HTML report with pass/fail/skip results
- Includes troubleshooting hints when tests fail
- Works via CLI, Docker, or CI

::: {.notes}
VIP is a pytest-based BDD test suite. It talks to real products via their APIs and UIs. The report is the artifact you hand to the customer.
:::

## What We Test

```{mermaid}
%%| fig-width: 10
flowchart LR
    VIP[VIP Test Suite]

    VIP --> C[Connect]
    VIP --> W[Workbench]
    VIP --> PM[Package Manager]
    VIP --> X[Cross-Cutting]

    C --> C1[Auth & Users]
    C --> C2[Content Deploy]
    C --> C3[Runtime Versions]
    C --> C4[System Diagnostics]

    W --> W1[Auth & Login]
    W --> W2[IDE Launch]
    W --> W3[Session Lifecycle]

    PM --> PM1[CRAN Repos]
    PM --> PM2[PyPI Repos]

    X --> X1[Security]
    X --> X2[Prerequisites]
    X --> X3[Performance]
```

::: {.notes}
Each branch is a test category. All tests are BDD — written in Gherkin so even non-developers can read the scenarios. Tests auto-skip when a product isn't configured, so you can run VIP against a partial deployment.
:::

## How to Run It

**Quickest — CLI:**

```bash
pip install posit-vip
vip verify --connect-url https://connect.example.com
```

**Docker:**

```bash
docker run ghcr.io/posit-dev/vip:latest \
  vip verify --connect-url https://connect.example.com
```

**CI** — already running on every PR. See the repo for details.

::: {.notes}
The simplest path is pip install and one command. Point it at a URL and it figures out the rest. The Docker image is for Kubernetes jobs — PTD uses this to validate customer clusters automatically.
:::

## Live Demo

`vip verify` against a live staging cluster

::: {.notes}
I'm going to run VIP against our ganso01-staging cluster. We'll see the CLI output, then walk through the HTML report — passed tests, a failure with troubleshooting hints, and the product badges.

(This is where you switch to the terminal for the live demo)
:::

## The Report

![Example VIP Report](images/report-summary.png){fig-align="center" width="80%"}

::: {.notes}
This is what the customer sees. Products under test, pass/fail summary, then results grouped by outcome. Failed tests show error tracebacks and troubleshooting hints — the yellow box tells operators what to check first. This is the artifact you share with the customer.
:::

## We Need Your Feedback

**We want to make VIP useful for your customer conversations.**

1. **Try it** — Run `vip verify` against a staging or customer cluster this week
2. **Tell us what's missing** — What checks do you wish existed? What do customers ask about that we don't test?
3. **Tell us what's confusing** — Is the report clear? Would a customer understand it?
4. **File issues** — github.com/posit-dev/vip/issues

**Your input directly shapes what we build next.**

::: {.notes}
This is not a finished product we're throwing over the wall. We need your field experience to make it useful. The tests we write should reflect what you see customers struggle with. If there's a check you find yourself doing manually every time, that should be a VIP test.
:::

## Get Started

- **Repository:** `github.com/posit-dev/vip`
- **Example Report:** `posit-dev.github.io/vip/example-report/`
- **Docker Image:** `ghcr.io/posit-dev/vip:latest`
- **Questions?** Reach out on Slack or file an issue

::: {.notes}
The example report is live on the website — you can share that link with customers today to show them what VIP produces. The getting-started page has install instructions.
:::
